UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores basic profile information for each user.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a single task that a user plans for their day.

title.description: A concise title or name for the task.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the task has been marked as completed.

category.description: The category of the task to help organize into columns.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was initially created.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this task.

DailySpark.title: DailySpark
DailySpark.description: Represents a daily inspiring, quirky, or unexpected suggestion/challenge generated by AI for the user.

sparkDate.description: The specific calendar date for which this daily spark was generated.

content.description: The actual text content of the daily spark or challenge.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the daily spark was generated.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this daily spark.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores basic profile information for each user.

/users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores individual tasks created and managed by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/dailySparks/{sparkId}.description: Stores AI-generated daily sparks or challenges provided to a specific user.
